steps.title: Add a related benefit
steps.content: The first sentence reports that caffeic acid helps cauliflower mushrooms combat free radicals. The next sentence extends that idea to humans, who also experience free radical damage.

steps.title: Choose an additive transition
steps.content: A would introduce an example, but humans are a related extension, not an example of mushrooms. C signals opposition, and D signals replacement. The transition should mean 'in addition.' The answer is B.
